feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a Zinvoice table with 'INVNO' as the ONLY key field.

Its type is XBLNR_KK which holds 16 chars.

I am updating this Z* table via reading big volume of data from flat file.

Sometimes i get same value for 'INVNO' field in different rows.
I use modify statement as below in the program.

modify zinvoice from wa_invoice.

Issues:
1)This statement is giving sy-subrc = 0 even when same 'INVNO' field is seen.
2) Also its NOT updating for different INVNO. What could be the reason?
3) Do i need to prefill 0's if INVNO is filled with 9 or 10 chars?

 

Can any one suggest pls.

entry.title: standard LIKP table not getting activated after append structure and doing se14
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am badly in need of help as client is waiting to move the tr into production. Plz help me with this issue.

 


I have added new field to the exising append structure zzlikp_append as per the business requirement to the standard table likp.
I have done se14 adjust and activate. 

The thing is that it is not throwing any error it is just processing. I would like to know how much time it will take to process 25000 records in my sandbox. it is more than 2 hours. 

I also faced one dump of 

TYPELOAD_NEW_VERSION”

which is not getting now. Neither it is showing any error. 

The only page in front of me is 

Is there any way to know how much time it will complete ?
or should I have to do anything to fix this issue ?

entry.title: Dunning Adobe form Custom Validations
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to implement ADOBE form for dunning process to generate dunning letter.

but before printing I need some validations for Customer. I am not getting the exact path where to put these validations. FIBF(00001720) fi-fi changed to FI_PRINT_DUNNING_NOTICE_PDF. But I am not getting where to put validations to avoid creating dunning if any validation fails.

Kindly help me with any approach I should follow.

I am new to FI, BTE world.

 

Thanks in advance,

Abhishek Aggarwal

entry.title: How to Resolve the Error : HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED in RAP Application?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I created a GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud. when I am selecting all the coming data( it is around 3000+ entries ) and send all the line items to another portal I am getting this below error.

Runtime Error : HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED. The O Data request processing has been abnormally terminated.

Error Cause:- "The maximum number of HTTP client connections has been exceeded". I found that there is multiple HTTP request are generated for a Instance and I am not able to handle this case.

Thanks for your Support.

entry.title: UX Innovation on SAP BTP - Cloud vs On Premise Solution
entry.content:
In BTP does UX innovations, Application Development (Low-code/no-code tool), Automation, machine learning, artificial intelligence, chatbots, Data analytics  are only available through cloud? or are they also be integrated for the on premise solution?

What would be the difference between Cloud and on premise solution?

Is there any of the of the above that are only limited to cloud solution and not available on premise?

entry.title: SUBMIT PROGRAM with export-import internal tables issue
entry.content:
Hi ,
I have a z*prog in se38 which has 1 parameter on selection screen p_file (say) for file input &
a check box to submit for no of jobs.
This prog reads that file with huge data into an internal table (say)itab_out which we normally  loop thru this itab_out to carry out further process.

Now, when i choose to schedule this program for Batch job submission, i break up that itab_out based on number of jobs chosen & build another itab_out2 & then call FM's JOB_OPEN, SUBMIT PROGRAM, JOB_CLOSE.

I am writing export itab_out2 followed by submit & return program stmt(same current prog) to pass the new table itab_out2.

 

1)export itab = itab_out2 to memory id 'MEM1'.
submit (lv_prog) via job lv_jobname number lv_jobnumber
with p_subjob = ''
with p_nojobs = p_nojobs
and return.

2) calling this import statement in beginning of same prog
 import itab = itab_out2 from memory id 'MEM1'.

 

 

However, i am not sure if this export import is working properly.


How do i determine if this SUBMIT, EXPORT & IMPORT is working properly or not?

entry.title: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steampunk?
entry.content:
After days of reading documentation, blogs and tutorials... I'm still no step further in what I was expecting to be a pretty straight-forward scenario. I must be missing something obvious, but what?

On our S/4HANA Public Edition development system, I have created an application job to automatically create credit memos. Works like a charm, up until the moment that I actually need to create the credit memo. Of course we want to use the available public API to do so.

There is a default communication arrangement for this API (SAP_COM_0158), which has INBOUND services linked. Makes sense, since I want to call this service to create the credit memo in SAP. That sounds indeed like an inbound interface. It should not matter whether I call it from an actual external system (like BTP) or in this case from the embedded ABAP environment. As far as S/4 is concerned, it is inbound.

This tutorial seems to come closest to what I want to achieve:
Implement an Outbound Service Call in SAP BTP, ABAP environment for an OData Service via Service Consumption Model 

Several components are required to make this work. We have a communication scenario ZCS_CREDIT_MEMO, in which I point to outbound service ZOBS_CREDIT_MEMO_REST. Then there is the consumption model ZCM_CREDIT_MEMO, based on the EDMX file from the business hub. It provides me with example code.

To get the destination, static method CREATE_BY_COMM_ARRANGEMENT is being called. Following the tutorial, I enter the communication scenario and the outbound service. This results in an exception. Apparently not the values SAP is expecting. I've tried several combinations of objects, so far nothing works.

DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                             comm_scenario  = 'ZCS_CREDIT_MEMO'
                                             service_id     = 'ZOBS_CREDIT_MEMO_REST' ).

In the debugger I can see the query to retrieve the communication arrangements uses table aps_ca_d_root as a basis. Unfortunately, this being public cloud, I cannot view the contents of that table to see what is actually there. That would be helpful in finding what I should provide the method.

In case I enter the communication arrangement as 'comm_scenario', the system does find the communication arrangement itself, but then filters on available outbound services. Which it does not have, since it's meant for inbound. Once again, no result, which results in the exception.

This has to be incredibly basic. What step am I missing here? Thanks in advance for the help!

entry.title: concatenate hrpad23 fields to validate with dbtablog abap 7.4
entry.content:
I am new to working with SAP Hana and I have not been able to solve the following problem:

I need to obtain the data from the hrpad23 table but only those that are in the dbtablog table. The problem is that to connect both tables I need to CONCATENATE the fields HRPAD23~MANDT and HRPAD23~ADATANR to compare it with the DBTABLOG~LOGKEY field, the limitations of the version abap with opensql does not allow me to CONCATENATE  in the sql statement (select)
I need help to be able to carry out this process in some way.

attentive to your comments.

Thank you

Juan Leiva

entry.title: The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action
entry.content:
Hi, RAP Experts,

The item table update always ends with runtime error in RAP action. But the similiar update for header table works. The following is the screenshots. Would you please help me on this ?

entry.title: How to connect an HTTP OnPremise destination using BasicAuthentication to a Fiori App in BAS on SAP?
entry.content:
I am working on SAP BTP and need to connect a destination to a Fiori App in the Business Application Studio. Here are the relevant details:

  1. Destination Details:
    - Type: HTTP
    - Proxy Type: OnPremise
    - Authentication: BasicAuthentication
  2. Cloud Connector:
    - Version: 2.14.2
    - Java Version: 1.8.0_252 (IcedTea)
  3. Exposed Back-End Systems:
    - Protocol: HTTP
    - Back-End Type: ABAP System

How can I connect the above destination to a Fiori App on SAP Business Application Studio?

entry.title: VL01N FIELD validation with Z_USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCEMENT causing error DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
As per the business requirement , I have added custom field ZZETA to LIKP table along with screen enhancement using BADI LE_SHP_TAB_CUST_HEAD.
TR got moved to production and everything was working fine. Now the user asked me he needs validation before saving in VL01N for ZZETA which I have added.
I have done some research and implemented the implicit enhancement for USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT in MV50AFZ1 .

                                   
The following is the code used in the enhancement implementation.

I am just validating the custom field with empty ZZETA and the following message is getting displayed

So far it is fine.

Now I have inserted ZZETA date and saved. 

The document got saved.

When I closed the page the following page is getting displayed.

 From ST22 analysis,

ABAP programming error
DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
SAPLV05I
An exception has occurred in class "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB". This exception was not
caught
in procedure "SD_PARTNER_UPDATE" "(FUNCTION)" or propagated by a RAISING
clause.
Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated this
exception, the current program was terminated.
The reason for the exception occurring was:
The reason for the exception is:
When an Open SQL array insert is performed, trying to insert a record
into the database table "VBPA" causes the function to terminate if a
record with the same key already exists.

The major concern here is though it is showing that Delivery of the product has been saved , it is not

getting updated in the LIKP table.



However, I am not working on VBPA table in this scenario. How to fix this error ?

Is that the code which is causing the issue, though there is no syntax error ? OR 

is this the wrong FM USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT I have used for validation ?

I am completely clueless now..............................Plz give me some hint how to proceed further.

entry.title: I am Facing Issue in ALV Field Catalog Merge FM
entry.content:
In ECC

CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE'
    EXPORTING
      i_program_name         = v_repid
      i_internal_tabname     = 'GT_OUTDATA'
      i_inclname             = v_repid
    CHANGING
      ct_fieldcat            = v_fieldcat[]
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_interface = 1
      program_error          = 2
      OTHERS                 = 3.

In Ecc i am Getting the Field CatLog Value's where i am Passing the GT_outdata as the internal table for getting Column name in v_fieldcat internal table.

 

 

Same Process i am doing in S4 But I am not Getting the values in V_fieldcat....

In S4

CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_FIELDCATALOG_MERGE'
    EXPORTING
      i_program_name         = v_repid
      i_internal_tabname     = 'GT_OUTDATA'
      i_inclname             = v_repid
    CHANGING
      ct_fieldcat            = v_fieldcat[]
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_interface = 1
      program_error          = 2
      OTHERS                 = 3.

Can anyone explain What will be the issue Insted of Passing Structure in Filed catalog merge Fm I need to pass Internal table only...

Any Suggestion???

entry.title: 403!!-Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from BTP ABAP Environment-Free tier(Steampunk)
entry.content:
Team,
I am following below blogs for Outbound communication to access OData service in S4 on-premise. Ended up with "403" forbidden error.

(Additional step 3 of adding SAP_COM_0200 into a communication Arrangement. SAP_COM_0200 is not available in steampunk instance)
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/outbound-communication-from-cloud-to-on-premise-in-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13540015

in Step 4 of below tutorial(S4 public is used in tutorial),
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html#0664684a-34cb-4c03-87cd-f72ffec8e773

I have added my virtual host and made 'Cloud Connector' switch on with an optional SCC ID given.

But after all this configuration , the check fails in Communication Arrangement

 

Error as follows:

Can anyone point our what i am missing!!!

Below my SAP CC config

Communication scenario:

CC Log: Request getting logged in Cloud Connector

 



Best regards,
Vishnu

@Mani_P_S   @ariannamussobarcucci  @FrankJentsch  Any help appreciated. @merveyalcin

entry.title: Create CR type dumps internally at CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL
entry.content:
Scenario: 'Create change Request type and activate 

Standard code dumps at select statement when joining FDT_ADMN_000 , FDT_RSTL_0000 with the version table FDT_ADMN_0030 We could not find the object id causing this dump

Dump :  Any one faced this issue, please let us know any suggestions regarding this.

entry.title: com.sap.it.spc.ibp.configure.views.workspaceNew could not be loaded
entry.content:
Hi 

I am facing the below issue could any one please  give resolution for the issue.

com.sap.it.spc.ibp.configure.views.workspaceNew could not be loaded

Thanks,

Mani

entry.title: Unable to access SAP BAS in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm using my trail account for SAP BTP and when I'm trying to launch SAP BAS from my trail account it says 

"Check Your Trial Account We could not open SAP Business Application Studio.
Check that your trial account has not been suspended. If needed, click the "Extend Free Trial" button in the cockpit.
I read some online blogs and added all the entitlements to my sub account. I even deleted my sub account twice and added all the entitlements but still the result is same.
Anyone please help me with this issue.

 

 
Thanks,
Karthik

entry.title: BTP Abap Environment additionalBinding metadata cache
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using RAP in the SAP BTP ABAP environment. This application includes Value Helps with additionalBinding. However, I have noticed that sometimes changes to the additionalBinding for a Value Help are not reflected on the frontend.

Upon investigation, I discovered that these Value Helps, which are based on other CDS Views, make a metadata call the first time they are invoked on the frontend.

This metadata, separate from the main Fiori Elements metadata, contains the additionalBinding as a Value Help input parameter. Unfortunately, it does not update according to the changes made in the CDS.

Eventually, the metadata updates after modifying the metadata extension object in other places. This issue is difficult to consistently replicate.

I suspect this might be a caching problem on the backend. In an on-premise system, we could clear the backend cache directly by running a report. However, in BTP, there seems to be no straightforward way to do this. How can I check if the cache is the problem, and how can I invalidate it to update this metadata on the frontend?

Thanks!

entry.title: Move Service from Free Plan to Standard Plan (BTP)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we developed a service in a free plan and want to move this service now to our standard plan. I haven't found any information about how to do this. We don't want to change the free plan into a standard plan!

Is there any information of how to do this?

Thanks, Sebastian

entry.title: How to enable PDF Preview in smart form print preview
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I can observe PDF Preview is disabled in my smart form output. Can some one help me to how i can i enable this option ? can we fix it via abap ?

entry.title: Dispute Management: Change Reason code Dropdown based on Category
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are having a requirement to dynamically change the reason code drop down(in t-codes SCASE/UDM_DISPUTE) based on the category being selected.

For example: if they select category A, the available values for reason should dynamically change based on a grouping logic.

We see an option in SPRO config to create an alternative input help, Finanacial Supply Chain Management -> Dispute Management -> Dispute Case Processing -> Attribute Profile -> Create Alternative Input Help for Attributes Kindly let us know how to make use of this and if any enhancement / BADI's are available to achieve this functionality.

Any feedback is greatly appreciated.

Thanks a lot.

Regards,

Prasad
